svg.title: Docsiphon before and after
svg.desc: A side-by-side comparison showing messy manual or generic crawling output versus Docsiphon's structured, audited Markdown export.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: From docsite chaos to an AI-ready local corpus

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: What changes when you move from manual export or generic mirroring to Docsiphon.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Before: manual copy, raw crawler, generic mirror

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: HTML dumps with weak path semantics
Resume behavior varies or does not exist
Poor handoff for AI / RAG prep
Better fit for chunking, embedding, review

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Inter, Arial, sans-serif
SF Pro Text, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: "Technically we fetched it" but nobody can tell what was exported, skipped, or mapped.

svg.text: A local Markdown tree with run metadata, review surfaces, and outputs you can trust again later.
